ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station (active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region or state where the station is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the data */,
  "sv_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "sv_time" INTEGER /* Time the data was collected */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., current weather, forecast) */,
  "report_subtype" TEXT /* More specific type of report (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "issued_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who issued the report */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start time for which the report is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End time for which the report is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_issued_by FOREIGN KEY ("issued_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather report that the data belongs to */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Direction of the wind */,
  "wind_record_type" TEXT /* Type of wind record (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "wind_speed_meters_per_second" REAL /* Speed of the wind in meters per second */,
  "temp_celcius" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "pressure_mmhg" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in mmHg */,
  "humidity_percent" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "visibility_km" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index value */,
  "dew_point_celsius" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weather_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weather_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., observation, forecast, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "wind_direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind direction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather warning */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather report that the warning belongs to */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of weather warning (e.g., tornado, flood) */,
  "warning_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather warning */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Level of severity (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the warning */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the warning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_warnings_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weather_reports ("report_id")
)
